spec_match.rationale: UDPSocket bind / send / receive — the datagram side of direct-sockets-api.

interactive.rationale: Probe support, attempt to bind, send / receive workflow.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Card promises probe + bind for UDP use cases; delivered.

edge_cases.rationale: Doesn't show multicast bind (mDNS/SSDP use cases the lede mentions). Doesn't show what happens with packet loss / out-of-order delivery.

references.rationale: See also links to chromestatus.com/feature/6248734232367104 — WRONG feature ID. This belongs to feature 6398297361088512. Critical rule #3 regression.

openQuestions.title: Fix the wrong chromestatus link
openQuestions.detail: See also points at chromestatus.com/feature/6248734232367104 but this concept belongs to feature 6398297361088512. Slug-recovery would relocate this folder under the wrong feature.

openQuestions.title: Demonstrate multicast bind
openQuestions.detail: The lede mentions mDNS / SSDP service discovery. Add a multicast-bind probe (e.g. 224.0.0.251:5353 for mDNS) to ground the use case.

summary: Honest UDPSocket demo. Ships the WRONG chromestatus feature ID and the multicast scenarios in the lede are never actually demonstrated.
